‘HERBARIUM OF IOWA STATE UNIVERSITY
BRAZIL
Chusquea all. baculifera da Silveira
Minas Gerais; Mun, Lima Duarte, Serra do Ibitipoca, Parque Estadual (Florestal) do.
bitipoca, Paredao do Rio Salto, forking from trail to Ponte da Pedra, 1300 m. 43°52'W,
2142'S,
Bamboo in “mata de altitude” on steep cliffs above the river. Surrounding vegetation in.
ravelly soil, with grasses, Velloviaceae, Melastomaceac, Cactaccac, Iridaceae, lichens,
nd mosses, Bamboo all vegetative, with a few new shoots, but the population apparently
flowered and died about 3-4 years ago. Old culms and seedlings scen at cliff top, and
below. Culms erect, 1-1.5 cm in diameter, mostly
seedlings seen in the elfin forest below. Culms erect, 1-L.5 cm in diameter, mostly
muller, 0 1-1,5 m tall. Internodes ca. 5-8 cm long, more or less waxy, green when
2 February 1991.
L, Clark & M. Morel 775,
‘Collected under the auspices of the National Science Foundation, lowa State University
and the Universidade Estadual de Sao Paulo
